tagline: Web design powered by Impeccable.style intelligence

highlights.title: 17 Design Commands
highlights.description: Audit, critique, polish, animate, colorize, distill — a full design toolkit built into the agent. Each command follows Impeccable.style principles.

highlights.title: Anti-Slop Detection
highlights.description: Automatic checks for AI-generated design clichés — gradient text, glassmorphism, neon-on-dark, identical card grids. Your interfaces look human-made.

highlights.title: Responsive & Adaptive
highlights.description: Mobile-first fluid design with container queries. Live preview updates as you edit — see changes on every breakpoint instantly.
